title: Capture latency baseline and hotspot inventory
summary: Profiles the agreed command set and turns the telemetry evidence into a ranked hotspot inventory.
scope_items: Run the agreed benchmark command set with telemetry enabled and capture 5-run medians for each command.
Review the emitted telemetry JSONL records and identify the slowest top-level operations and nested hotspots.
Record the ranked hotspot inventory and the first optimization order in the initiative evidence surfaces.
done_when_items: The initiative has a stable benchmark baseline covering host, reusable-core, and plan command paths.
The top latency offenders are ranked with telemetry evidence rather than intuition.
